news_items.headline: Rangers' Corey Seager back on IL with lower back inflammation
news_items.description: Rangers shortstop Corey Seager was placed on the 10-day injured list before Wednesday's game against the Guardians because of lower back inflammation.

news_items.headline: Mets owner Cohen on dismissing Stearns: 'Not gonna do it'
news_items.description: Mets owner Steve Cohen said Wednesday that he is not considering dismissing president of baseball operations David Stearns, who is in the third year of a five-year contract, despite a second straight disappointing season.

news_items.headline: Willits, De Paula, Made among MLB All-Star Futures Game selections
news_items.description: Nationals shortstop Eli Willits, the top overall pick in last year's amateur draft, was among 50 players picked Wednesday for the All-Star Futures Game at Philadelphia's Citizens Bank Park on July 12.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball: What's wrong with these superstars?
news_items.description: There's three fantasy stars who's slumps are lasting longer than normal -- and we shouldn't worry.

news_items.headline: Marlins record team-best 20-win month after dismantling Rockies
news_items.description: Javier Sanoja and Owen Caissie each hit three-run homers and Joe Mack added a two-run shot as the Marlins defeated the Rockies 14-3 to claim their franchise-best 20th win of June.

news_items.headline: Marlins record team-best 20-win month after dismantling Rockies
